example.py: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
example.en: What is your name?

好.definition: fine, good, nice, OK, it's settled

example.py: Wǒ hěn hǎo
example.en: I am fine

请.definition: please (polite form of request), to treat or to invite (somebody)

example.py: Qǐng wèn, nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What's your family name, please?

example.py: Qǐng wèn, nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What's your family name, please?

example.py: Nǐ guì xìng?
example.en: What is your family name? (Lit. Your honorable family name is...?)

姓.definition: (one's) family name is . . . ; family name [See Grammar 1.]

example.py: Wǒ xìng Lǐ.
example.en: My family name is Li.

example.py: Wǒ jiào Wáng Péng.
example.en: My name is Wang Peng.

example.py: Wǒ xìng Lǐ, nǐ ne?
example.en: My family name is Li. How about you?

example.cn: 李小姐, 你叫什么名字?
example.py: Lǐ xiǎojiě, nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?

叫.definition: to be called, to call [See Grammar 3.]

example.py: Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎopéng.
example.en: My name is Wang Xiaopeng.

example.py: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
example.en: What is your name?

example.py: Nǐ jiào shénme míngzi?
example.en: What is your name?

example.py: Wǒ xìng Lǐ.
example.en: My family name is Li.

example.py: Wǒ jiào Wáng Péng, nǐ ne?
example.en: My name is Wang Peng. How about you?

example.py: Wǒ xìng Wáng.
example.en: My family name is Wang.

example.py: Wǒ shì lǎoshī.
example.en: I am a teacher.

example.py: Nǐ shì lǎoshī ma?
example.en: Are you a teacher?

example.py: Nǐ shì lǎoshī ma?
example.en: Are you a teacher?

example.py: Wáng Péng bú shì Měiguó rén.
example.en: Wang Peng is not American.

example.py: Lǐ Yōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Li You is a student.

example.py: Wǒ yě shì xuésheng.
example.en: I'm a student, too.

example.py: Wáng Péng bú shì Měiguó rén.
example.en: Wang Peng is not American.

example.py: Lǐ Yōu bú shì Zhōngguó rén.
example.en: Li You is not Chinese.

example.py: Wǒ bú shì Běijīng rén.
example.en: I am not from Beijing.

example.py: Wáng Péng bú shì Měiguó rén.
example.en: Wang Peng is not American.

example.cn: 你不是纽约人, 我也不是纽约人。
example.py: Nǐ bú shì Niǔyuē rén, wǒ yě bú shì Niǔyuē rén.
example.en: You are not from New York. I am not from New York, either.

example.py: Nà ge nǚ háizi shì Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: That girl is Li You.

example.py: Nà míngtiān ne?
example.en: Then how about tomorrow?

example.py: Zhè shì shéi?
example.en: Who is this?

个.definition: (measure word for many common everyday objects) [See Grammar 2.]

example.py: Nà ge nǚ háizi shì Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: That girl is Li You.

example.py: Nà ge nǚ háizi shì Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: That girl is Li You.

example.py: Nà ge nǚ háizi shì Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: That girl is Li You.

example.py: Shéi shì Lǐ Yǒu?
example.en: Who is Li You?

example.py: Shéi yǒu jiějie?
example.en: Who has older sisters?

example.py: Wáng xiānsheng yǒu dìdi ma?
example.en: Does Mr. Wang have a younger brother?

有.definition: to have, to exist [See Grammar 4 and Grammar 5.]

example.py: Shéi yǒu jiějie?
example.en: Who has older sisters?

example.py: Wáng xiānsheng méiyǒu dìdi.
example.en: Mr. Wang doesn't have any younger brothers.

example.py: Gāo Wénzhōng yǒu jiějie.
example.en: Gao Wenzhong has an older sister.

example.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example.en: There are five people in my family.

口.definition: (measure word for number of family members)

example.py: Wǒ jiā yǒu wǔ kǒu rén.
example.en: There are five people in my family.

example.py: Xiǎo Gāo jiā yǒu liǎng ge dàxuéshēng.
example.en: There are two college students in Little Gao's family.

example.cn: 王朋和白英爱都有妹妹。
example.py: Wáng Péng hé Bái Yīng'ài dōu yǒu mèimei.
example.en: Both Wang Peng and Bai Ying'ai have younger sisters.

example.cn: 王朋、李友和高文中都是学生。
example.py: Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu hé Gāo Wénzhōng dōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Wang Peng, Li You, and Gao Wenzhong are all students.

example.cn: 他/她做什么工作? 你呢?
example.py: Tā zuò shénme gōngzuò? Nǐ ne?
example.en: What does he/she do? How about you?

example.cn: 你爸爸妈妈做什么工作?
example.py: Nǐ bàba māma zuò shénme gōngzuò?

example.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example.py: Wǒ bàba shì lǜshī, māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī, gēge, mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng.

example.cn: 我爸爸是律师,妈妈是英文老师,哥哥、妹妹都是大学生。
example.py: Wǒ bàba shì lǜshī, māma shì Yīngwén lǎoshī, gēge, mèimei dōu shì dàxuéshēng.

example.cn: 王朋、李友和高文中都是学生。
example.py: Wáng Péng, Lǐ Yǒu hé Gāo Wénzhōng dōu shì xuésheng.
example.en: Wang Peng, Li You, and Gao Wenzhong are all students.

example.py: Xiǎo Gāo jiā yǒu liǎng ge dàxuéshēng.
example.en: There are two college students in Little Gao's family.

example.cn: 王朋和白英爱都有妹妹。
example.py: Wáng Péng hé Bái Yīng'ài dōu yǒu mèimei.
example.en: Both Wang Peng and Bai Ying'ai have younger sisters.

号.definition: (measure word for position in a numerical series, day of the month)

example.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example.py: Jīntiān Māma hē le sān bēi shuǐ.
example.en: Mom drank three glasses of water today.

生.definition: to give birth to, to be born

example.py: Nǐ jīnnián duō dà?
example.en: Say this to find out someone's age.

example.py: Nǐ jīnnián duō dà?
example.en: Say this to find out someone's age.

example.cn: 你和我两个人吃饭,五个菜太多了。
example.py: Nǐ hé wǒ liǎng ge rén chī fàn, wǔ ge cài tài duō le.
example.en: It's just the two of us eating. Five dishes are too many.

example.py: Nǐ jīnnián duō dà?
example.en: Say this to find out someone's age.

example.py: wǒ shíbā suì
example.en: I'm eighteen years old

example.py: Wǒ shíbā suì.
example.en: I'm eighteen years old.

example.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example.py: wǒ qǐng nǐ chī fàn.
example.en: I will treat you to dinner.

怎么样.definition: Is it OK? How is that? How does that sound?

example.cn: 今天晚上我请你和你妹妹吃美国菜，怎么样？
example.py: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ qǐng nǐ hé nǐ mèimei chī Měiguó cài, zěnmeyàng?
example.en: I'll treat you and your younger sister to American food tonight. How about it?

example.py: Tài hǎo le!
example.en: That's great!

example.cn: 他(是)喜欢吃中国菜还是喜欢吃美国菜?
example.py: Tā (shì) xǐhuan chī Zhōngguó cài háishi xǐhuan chī Měiguó cài?
example.en: Does he like to eat Chinese or American food?

example.cn: 明天李先生请你吃中国菜。
example.py: Míngtiān Lǐ xiānsheng qǐng nǐ chī Zhōngguó cài.
example.en: Mr. Li is inviting you to have Chinese food tomorrow.

example.cn: 你哥哥是老师还是学生?
example.py: Nǐ gēge shì lǎoshī háishi xuésheng?
example.en: Is your older brother a teacher or a student?

点.definition: o'clock (lit. dot, point, thus "points on the clock")

example.cn: 今天晚上我请你和你妹妹吃美国菜, 怎么样?
example.py: Jīntiān wǎnshang wǒ qǐng nǐ hé nǐ mèimei chī Měiguó cài, zěnmeyàng?
example.en: I'll treat you and your younger sister to American food tonight. How about it?

example.cn: 请问, 王律师今天有没有事儿?
example.py: Qǐng wèn, Wáng lǜshī jīntiān yǒu méi yǒu shìr?
example.en: Excuse me, is Lawyer Wang free today or not?

example.py: Wǒ jīntiān hěn máng.
example.en: I am very busy today.

example.py: Wǒ jīntiān hěn máng.
example.en: I am very busy today.

example.py: Nǐ jīntiān máng bu máng?
example.en: Are you busy today?

example.py: Nǐ wèishénme qǐng wǒ chī fàn?

example.cn: 白英爱请高文中和王朋,还请李友。
example.py: Bái Yīng'ài qǐng Gāo Wénzhōng hé Wáng Péng, hái qǐng Lǐ Yǒu.
example.en: Bai Ying'ai is inviting Gao Wenzhong and Wang Peng, and Li You, too.

认识.definition: to be acquainted with, to recognize

example.cn: 周末我去跳舞, 你去不去?
example.py: Zhōumò wǒ qù tiào wǔ, nǐ qù bu qù?
example.en: I'll go dancing this weekend. Are you going?

example.py: Nǐ de tóngxué qù bu qù dǎ qiú?
example.en: Are your classmates going to play ball?

看.definition: to watch, to look, to read

example.cn: 她今天晚上看不看电视?
example.py: Tā jīntiān wǎnshang kàn bu kàn diànshì?
example.en: Is she going to watch TV tonight?

example.cn: 她今天晚上看不看电视？
example.py: Tā jīntiān wǎnshang kàn bu kàn diànshì?
example.en: Is she going to watch TV tonight?

example.py: Nǐ xǐhuan bu xǐhuan tiào wǔ?
example.en: Do you like dancing?

example.py: Wáng Péng zhōumò/chángcháng tīng yīnyuè
example.en: Wang Peng often listens to music on weekends.

example.py: Wáng Péng chángcháng tīng yīnyuè.
example.en: Wang Peng often listens to music on weekends.

时候.definition: (a point in) time, moment, (a duration of) time

example.py: Nǐ xǐhuan bu xǐhuan kàn diànyǐng?
Wǒ zhōumò chángcháng kàn diànyǐng.
Wǒmen míngtiān qù kàn diànyǐng.
example.en: We are going to see a movie tomorrow.

example.cn: 高文中今天下午五点半去看外国电影。
example.py: Gāo Wénzhōng jīntiān xiàwǔ wǔ diǎn bàn qù kàn wàiguó diànyǐng.
example.en: Gao Wenzhong will go to see a foreign movie at 5:30 this afternoon.

请客.definition: to invite someone (to dinner, coffee, etc.), to play the host

example.py: Hǎo, wǒ qǐng kè.
example.en: OK, my treat.

example.py: hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn
example.en: Long time no see

想.definition: to want to, would like to [See Grammar 6.]

example.py: Nǐ xiǎng tīng yīnyuè ma?
example.en: Would you like to listen to some music?

example.cn: 我觉得看电影没有意思
example.py: Wǒ juéde kàn diànyǐng méiyǒu yìsi
example.en: I think going to the movies is not much fun.

example.cn: 我觉得看电影没有意思
example.py: Wǒ juéde kàn diànyǐng méiyǒu yìsi
example.en: I think going to the movies is not much fun.

example.py: Wǒ zhǐ xiǎng chī fàn, shuì jiào.
Wǒ zhǐ xiǎng chī fàn, shuì jiào.
shuì yí ge hǎo jiào
example.en: have a good sleep

example.py: shuì yí ge hǎo jiào
example.en: have a good sleep

example.py: Suàn le, wǒ qù zhǎo biérén.
Suàn le, wǒ qù zhǎo biérén.
Suàn le, wǒ qù zhǎo biérén.

呀.definition: (interjectory particle used to soften a question)

example.py: Nǐ jìn lai yí xià.
example.en: Come in for a minute.

example.cn: 你看一下, 这是谁的照片?
example.py: Nǐ kàn yí xià, zhè shì shéi de zhàopiàn?
example.en: Take a look. Whose photo is this?

example.py: Wǒ jīntiān hěn gāoxìng.
example.en: I'm very happy today.

example.py: Tā mèimei hěn piàoliang.
example.en: His younger sister is very pretty.

example.py: Nǐ zài nǎr gōngzuò?
example.en: Where do you work?

在.definition: to be present, to be at (a place)

example.py: Wǒmen zài nǎr jiànmiàn?
example.en: Where will we meet?

example.py: Nǐ zài nǎr gōngzuò?
example.en: Where do you work?

example.py: Nǐ hē yì diǎnr chá ba.
example.en: Have some tea.

点(儿).definition: a little, a bit, some [See Grammar 1.]

example.py: Nǐ xiǎng chī diǎnr shénme?
example.en: What would you like to eat?

example.py: Nǐ hē yì diǎnr chá ba.
example.en: Have some tea.

example.py: Nǐ hē kāfēi ba.
example.en: Why don't you have some coffee?

example.py: Qǐng jìn lai ba.
example.en: Come in, please.

要.definition: will, to be going to, to want to, to have a desire to [See Grammar 2.]

example.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example.py: Míngtiān xiàwù sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

example.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.
example.en: He gave me a call.

杯.definition: (measure word for things contained in a cup or glass)

example.py: Jīntiān Māma hē le sān bēi shuǐ.
example.en: Mom drank three glasses of water today.

example.cn: 我请他六点吃晚饭,他六点半才来。
example.py: Wǒ qǐng tā liù diǎn chī wǎnfàn, tā liù diǎn bàn cái lái.
example.en: I invited him out to dinner at six o'clock. He didn't arrive until six-thirty.

example.cn: 小高常常晚上十二点才回家。
example.py: Xiǎo Gāo chángcháng wǎnshang shí'èr diǎn cái huí jiā.
example.en: Little Gao often doesn't come home until midnight.

example.cn: 小高常常晚上十二点才回家。
example.py: Xiǎo Gāo chángcháng wǎnshang shí'èr diǎn cái huí jiā.
example.en: Little Gao often doesn't come home until midnight.

example.cn: 我昨天很忙，没给妈妈打电话。
example.py: Wǒ zuótiān hěn máng, méi gěi māma dǎ diànhuà.
example.en: I was very busy yesterday. I didn't call my mother.

example.py: Tā gěi wǒ dǎ le yí ge diànhuà.
example.en: He gave me a call.

example.py: Wǒmen zài nǎr jiànmiàn?
example.en: Where will we meet?

example.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example.py: Míngtiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

example.py: Wǒ wèn tā yí ge wèntí
example.en: I ask her a question

example.cn: 明天我不去小白家玩儿,我要开会。
example.py: Míngtiān wǒ bú qù Xiǎo Bái jiā wánr, wǒ yào kāi huì.
example.en: I'm not going to visit Little Bai tomorrow. I am going to a meeting.

开.definition: to open, to hold (a meeting, party, etc.)

example.cn: 明天我不去小白家玩儿,我要开会。
example.py: Míngtiān wǒ bú qù Xiǎo Bái jiā wánr, wǒ yào kāi huì.
example.en: I'm not going to visit Little Bai tomorrow. I am going to a meeting.

example.cn: 明天我不去小白家玩儿, 我要开会。
example.py: Míngtiān wǒ bú qù Xiǎo Bái jiā wánr, wǒ yào kāi huì.
example.en: I'm not going to visit Little Bai tomorrow. I am going to a meeting.

example.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example.py: Míngtiān xiàwǔ sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

考试.definition: to give or take a test; test

example.cn: 明天下午三点我要给二年级考试。
example.py: Míngtiān xiàwù sān diǎn wǒ yào gěi èr niánjí kǎo shì.
example.en: I'm going to give the second-year class a test at 3:00 p.m. tomorrow.

考.definition: to give or take a test

以后.definition: after, from now on, later on

example.cn: 你有你姐姐的照片吗?给我看一下,行吗?
example.py: Nǐ yǒu nǐ jiějie de zhàopiàn ma? Gěi wǒ kàn yí xià, xíng ma?
example.en: Do you have a picture of your older sister? Can I have a look?

example.py: Bié kèqi.
example.en: You're welcome.

example.py: Bié kèqi.
example.en: You're welcome.

example.py: Wǒ xué Zhōngwén, nǐ ne?
example.en: I study Chinese. How about you?

example.cn: 你帮我准备一下, 跟我练习说中文, 好吗?
example.py: nǐ bāng wǒ zhǔnbèi yí xià, gēn wǒ liànxí shuō Zhōngwén, hǎo ma?

example.cn: 你帮我准备一下, 跟我练习说中文, 好吗?
example.py: nǐ bāng wǒ zhǔnbèi yí xià, gēn wǒ liànxí shuō Zhōngwén, hǎo ma?

example.cn: 你帮我准备一下, 跟我练习说中文, 好吗?
example.py: nǐ bāng wǒ zhǔnbèi yí xià, gēn wǒ liànxí shuō Zhōngwén, hǎo ma?

啊.definition: (a sentence-final particle of exclamation, interrogation, etc.)

example.cn: 好啊, 但是你得请我喝咖啡。
example.py: Hǎo a, dànshì nǐ děi qǐng wǒ hē kāfēi.

example.cn: 好啊, 但是你得请我喝咖啡。
example.py: Hǎo a, dànshì nǐ děi qǐng wǒ hē kāfēi.

example.cn: 我现在得去开会, 没空儿跟你聊天儿。
example.py: Wǒ xiànzài děi qù kāi huì, méi kòngr gēn nǐ liáo tiānr.
example.en: I have to go to a meeting right now, and don't have time to chat with you.

example.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.
example.en: He writes characters very well.

example.cn: 我现在得去开会, 没空儿跟你聊天儿。
example.py: Wǒ xiànzài děi qù kāi huì, méi kòngr gēn nǐ liáo tiānr.
example.en: I have to go to a meeting right now, and don't have time to chat with you.

见面.definition: to meet up, to meet with

example.py: Nǐ shénme shíhou huí lai?
example.en: When are you coming back?

example.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.
example.en: He writes characters very well.

example.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de hěn hǎo.
example.en: He writes characters very well.

枝.definition: (measure word for long, thin, inflexible objects such as pens, pencils, etc.)

张.definition: (measure word for flat objects such as paper, pictures, etc.)

example.cn: 八点上课, 小张八点半才来。
example.py: Bā diǎn shàng kè, Xiǎo Zhāng bā diǎn bàn cái lái.
example.en: Class starts at 8:00, but Little Zhang didn't come until 8:30.

example.cn: 小李, 你写字写得真好! 你可以教我吗?
example.py: Xiǎo Lǐ, nǐ xiě zì xiě de zhēn hǎo! Nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?
example.en: Little Li, you write characters really well! Could you teach me?

example.py: Tā xiě zì xiě de zěnmeyàng?
example.en: How well does he write characters?

example.cn: 小李, 你写字写得真好! 你可以教我吗?
example.py: Xiǎo Lǐ, nǐ xiě zì xiě de zhēn hǎo! Nǐ kěyǐ jiāo wǒ ma?
example.en: Little Li, you write characters really well! Could you teach me?

example.cn: 老师教我们生词和语法。
example.py: Lǎoshī jiāo wǒmen shēngcí hé yǔfǎ.
example.en: The teacher teaches us vocabulary and grammar.

example.cn: 我觉得这一课生词有(一)点儿多。
example.py: Wǒ juéde zhè yí kè shēngcí yǒu(yì)diǎnr duō.
example.en: I think there are a few too many new words in this lesson.

example.py: Nǐ jiāo wǒ Hànzì, kěyǐ ma?
example.en: Will you teach me Chinese characters, please?

example.cn: 我觉得中文有(一)点儿难。
example.py: Wǒ juéde Zhōngwén yǒu(yì)diǎnr nán.
example.en: I think Chinese is a little hard.

example.cn: 小白很喜欢学中文。她晚上预习课文、复习语法、练习写汉字, 常常很晚才睡觉。
example.py: Xiǎo Bái hěn xǐhuan xué Zhōngwén. Tā wǎnshang yùxí kèwén, fùxí yǔfǎ, liànxí xiě Hànzì, chángcháng hěn wǎn cái shuì jiào.
example.en: Little Bai likes to study Chinese a lot. At night, she previews the text, reviews the grammar, and practices writing the characters. Often she doesn't go to bed until very late.

上课.definition: to go to a class, to start a class, to be in class

example.cn: 她晚上预习课文、复习语法、练习写汉字,常常很晚才睡觉。
example.py: Tā wǎnshang yùxí kèwén, fùxí yǔfǎ, liànxí xiě Hànzì, chángcháng hěn wǎn cái shuì jiào.
example.en: At night, she previews the text, reviews the grammar, and practices writing the characters. Often she doesn't go to bed until very late.
